privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.description: This Privacy Policy explains how information is collected, used, and protected when you visit this website.
privacyPolicy.questions: If you have questions about this policy, you can contact me through the contact form available on this website.
privacyPolicy.collected: This website collects limited information in the following ways.
privacyPolicy.contactFormDescription: If you contact me through the website's contact form, you may be asked to provide:
privacyPolicy.name: Your name
privacyPolicy.used: This information is used only to respond to your inquiry and discuss potential collaboration or services.
privacyPolicy.notUsed: The information is not used for marketing purposes, newsletters, or shared with third parties.
privacyPolicy.analyticsDataDescription: This website uses Google Analytics to understand how visitors interact with the website.
privacyPolicy.analyticsDataCollected: Google Analytics may collect information such as:
privacyPolicy.googleStore: Google may store this data on servers located outside the European Union.
privacyPolicy.googlePrivacyPolicy: For more information, see Google's Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.cookiesDescription: Google Analytics may use cookies to analyze website traffic.
privacyPolicy.cookiesStored: Cookies are small text files stored on your device.
privacyPolicy.cookiesDisabled: You can disable cookies through your browser settings if you prefer not to allow them.
privacyPolicy.purposeOfDataProcessingDescription: The limited data collected is used only for:
privacyPolicy.noPersonalData: No personal data is sold, rented, or used for advertising purposes.
privacyPolicy.messagesStored: Messages sent through the contact form may be stored for a reasonable period in order to maintain communication related to services or collaboration.
privacyPolicy.analyticsRetention: Analytics data retention is determined by Google Analytics settings.
privacyPolicy.europeanUnion: If you are located in the European Union, you have the right to:
privacyPolicy.requestAccess: Request access to your personal data
privacyPolicy.objectToProcessing: Object to the processing of your data
privacyPolicy.ifYouWishToExerciseAnyOfTheseRights: If you wish to exercise any of these rights, please contact me through the website.
privacyPolicy.thirdPartyServicesDescription: This website may use third-party services including:
privacyPolicy.googleAnalyticsDescription: These services may collect and process data according to their own privacy policies.
privacyPolicy.dataSecurityDescription: Reasonable technical and organizational measures are taken to protect personal information from unauthorized access, disclosure, or misuse.
privacyPolicy.noMethodOfTransmission: However, no method of transmission over the internet is completely secure.
privacyPolicy.changesToThisPolicyDescription: This Privacy Policy may be updated from time to time.
privacyPolicy.anyUpdatesRevisionDate: Any updates will be posted on this page with an updated revision date.
privacyPolicy.contactDescription: If you have questions about this policy, you can contact me through the contact form available on this website or by email to

cookiesPolicy.title: Cookies Policy
cookiesPolicy.description: This Cookies Policy explains how cookies are used on this website and how you can control them.
cookiesPolicy.whatAreCookiesDescription: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help websites function properly and provide information about how visitors interact with the site.
cookiesPolicy.howThisWebsiteUsesCookiesDescription: This website uses cookies only for basic functionality and website analytics.
cookiesPolicy.analyticsCookiesDescription: This website uses Google Analytics to understand how visitors use the website. These cookies collect information such as
cookiesPolicy.dataCollected: This data is collected in an aggregated and anonymous form and is used only to improve the website and user experience.
cookiesPolicy.thirdPartyCookiesDescription: Google Analytics may set cookies on your device. These cookies are managed by Google and are subject to Google's privacy policies.
cookiesPolicy.thirdPartyCookiesLearnMore: You can learn more about how Google uses data here
cookiesPolicy.managingCookiesDescription: You can control or disable cookies through your browser settings. Most browsers allow you to refuse cookies or delete cookies that have already been stored.
cookiesPolicy.disablingCookiesMayAffect: Please note that disabling cookies may affect how some websites function.
cookiesPolicy.changesToThisCookiesPolicyDescription: This Cookies Policy may be updated from time to time. Any updates will be posted on this page with a revised date.
cookiesPolicy.contactDescription: If you have any questions about this Cookies Policy, you can contact the website owner through the contact form available on this website.

legalNotice.title: Legal Notice

legalNotice.websiteMayAlsoProvideInformation: The website may also provide information about professional services and allow visitors to contact the website owner through a contact form.
legalNotice.termsOfUseDescription: By accessing and using this website, the user agrees to use the website in accordance with applicable laws and this Legal Notice.
legalNotice.userAgreesNotToUseWebsite: The user agrees not to use the website for unlawful purposes or in any way that may damage, disable, or impair the website or interfere with other users' access to the website.
legalNotice.intellectualPropertyDescription: All content on this website, including but not limited to text, code, graphics, design, logos, and images, is the property of the website owner unless otherwise stated.
legalNotice.unauthorizedReproduction: Unauthorized reproduction, distribution, modification, or use of any content from this website without prior written permission is prohibited.
legalNotice.externalLinksDescription: This website may contain links to external websites operated by third parties. The website owner has no control over the content of these external websites and assumes no responsibility for their content, policies, or practices.
legalNotice.limitationOfLiabilityDescription: The website owner makes reasonable efforts to ensure that the information on this website is accurate and up to date. However, no guarantee is given regarding the completeness, accuracy, or reliability of the information.
legalNotice.websiteOwnerShallNotBeHeldLiable: The website owner shall not be held liable for any damages arising from the use of this website or from reliance on the information provided.
legalNotice.dataProtectionDescription: Personal data submitted through the contact form will only be used to respond to inquiries and will not be used for marketing purposes.
legalNotice.moreInformation: For more information on how personal data is handled, please refer to the
legalNotice.applicableLawDescription: This Legal Notice shall be governed by and interpreted in accordance with the laws of Spain.
legalNotice.jurisdiction: Any disputes arising from the use of this website shall be subject to the jurisdiction of the competent courts in Spain.

hero.title: About Me
hero.subtitle: I’m a Frontend Developer and Product Designer who builds modern web applications with a strong focus on usability, performance, and clean architecture.
hero.description: With a background in both design and engineering, I bridge the gap between visual creativity and technical execution. My goal is simple: create digital products that are beautiful, intuitive, and scalable.
hero.works: I work with companies and startups around the world to transform ideas into high-quality web experiences.

background.title: My Background
background.description: My path into tech started from the design side.
background.description2: I began my career working with graphic design and user experience, helping brands communicate visually and craft better digital products. Over time, I became increasingly interested in the technical side of building those experiences.
background.description3: That curiosity led me to transition into frontend development, where I could combine design thinking with engineering.
background.description4: Today, I specialize in building modern web applications with React and Next.js, focusing on performance, scalability, and exceptional user experience.
background.description5: With experience working in professional development teams and delivering production-ready applications, I understand what it takes to build software that is not only visually polished but also maintainable and reliable.

whatIDo.title: What I Do
whatIDo.description: I help companies design and build modern digital products.
whatIDo.workFocus: My work focuses on three areas:
whatIDo.fastBuilding: Building fast, scalable, and maintainable web applications using modern technologies.
whatIDo.intuitiveDesign: Designing interfaces that are intuitive, elegant, and user-focused.
whatIDo.designDrivenDevelopmentDescription: Combining design and development to create products where form and function work together seamlessly.

approach.title: My Approach
approach.description: I believe great digital products are created when design and engineering work together from the beginning.
approach.iFocusOn: Instead of simply implementing designs, I focus on solving real product problems and building experiences that users actually enjoy using.
approach.alsoPassionateAbout: I’m also passionate about building reusable UI systems and scalable frontend architectures.

quote.description: Ideas bloom where the mind wanders, not just where the screen glows.

contact.description: If you’re looking for a developer who understands both product design and frontend engineering, I’d love to hear about your project.

experience.title: My long experience counts on
experience.scalableWebApplications: years of Building scalable web applications

hero.title: My services
hero.subtitle: Frontend Development & UI Design. I help businesses build fast, scalable, and beautifully designed web experiences.
hero.description: I help you bring your ideas to life with a clean design and reliable frontend development — creating websites and applications that are both beautiful and built to perform.

cards.title: What I can help you with

process.title: My process
process.description: My process is simple and straightforward. I follow a step-by-step approach to build your project.

steps.discoveryDescription: Understanding your goals, audience, and vision to define the right direction.
steps.designDescription: Creating intuitive layouts and a visual identity that reflects your brand.
steps.developmentDescription: Building a fast, scalable, and reliable product using modern technologies.
steps.launchDescription: Testing, refining, and launching your project with performance in mind.

quote.description: I combine engineering precision with design intuition — so your product not only works, but feels right.
